events.title: Paul McCartney turns 84
events.blurb: Sir Paul McCartney, legendary co-founder of The Beatles, celebrates his 84th birthday today.

angles.name: Macca's Legacy
angles.copy: Happy birthday to the one and only Sir Paul McCartney, still making music and magic at 84! What's your favourite McCartney moment?

events.title: Alison Moyet turns 65
events.blurb: English singer-songwriter Alison Moyet, known for her powerful voice and work with Yazoo, celebrates her 65th birthday.

angles.name: Moyet's Voice
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 65th birthday to the incredible Alison Moyet! Her voice is truly unmistakable. Which of her hits is your favourite?

events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and record producer Lionel Richie, known for his solo hits and work with the Commodores, celebrates his 77th birthday.

angles.name: Hello, Lionel!
angles.copy: Is it him you're looking for? It's Lionel Richie's 77th birthday! Time to get 'All Night Long' with his classic tracks.

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Grammy, Emmy, and Tony Award-winning American singer Cyndi Lauper, famous for her distinctive style and hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun', celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Cyndi's Still Fun
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the absolute icon that is Cyndi Lauper! Girls (and everyone else) still just want to have fun with her music.

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering George Michael, who would have celebrated his 63rd birthday today. The iconic British singer left an indelible mark on pop music.

angles.name: Remembering George
angles.copy: Thinking of the incredible George Michael on what would have been his 63rd birthday. His music truly had 'Faith'. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of the 'King of Pop', Michael Jackson, who passed away on June 25, 2009.

angles.name: King of Pop Legacy
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the unparalleled talent of Michael Jackson. His music continues to thrill generations. What's your ultimate MJ track?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Sir Ringo Starr, drummer for The Beatles, celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Peace & Love for Ringo
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! Keep spreading that 'Peace and Love', Ringo!

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen guitarist and astrophysicist Sir Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock God & Scientist
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! Guitar legend, astrophysicist... what a man!

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Sir Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Mick's Still Rolling
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger! Still got those moves. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: Anniversary of MTV's launch
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched with its first video, The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star', forever changing the music landscape.

angles.name: Radio Lives On
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Well, we're still here and sounding great, aren't we?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, kicking off the Britpop era.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 22 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. An album that defined a generation and still sounds massive. What's your top track from it?

events.title: Anniversary of Woodstock Festival
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music and counterculture history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. What an incredible moment in history!

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering the one and only Elvis Presley on the anniversary of his passing. His legacy as the King of Rock & Roll lives on.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released on September 26, 1969, featuring some of their most beloved tracks.

angles.name: Across The Abbey Road
angles.copy: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' dropped on this day in 1969, giving us that legendary zebra crossing cover. What's your favourite track from it?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, lead singer of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Frontwoman
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, still 'Brass in Pocket' after all these years.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Mad For It Liam
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock and roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam tune?

events.title: Anniversary of the first iPod's release
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the revolutionary first iPod on October 23, 2001, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changing how we listen to music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember when you could fit 1,000 songs in your pocket? Today marks the anniversary of Apple unveiling the original iPod back in 2001!

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Licence to thrill, iconic gadgets, and those legendary theme tunes. Who's your favourite 007?
